# playlistDestination(withName:)

**Type Method**

Creates a new playlist destination for the media item.

## Declaration

```swift
class func playlistDestination(withName playlistName: String) -> Self
```

## Return Value

A new [doc://com.apple.sirikit/documentation/Intents/INMediaDestinationReference] object or `nil` if unable to create.

## Creating a Media Destination Object

- **library()**: Creates a new library destination for the media item.

items.description: Creates a new library destination for the media item.
items.name: library()
